markdownRemark.html:
OpenAI, an American artificial intelligence (AI) research company released an AI chatbot named ChatGPT on November 2022. After releasing ChatGPT, it crossed over a million user within 5 days. And reached 100 million users within 2 months. On March 14, 2023 OpenAI released GPT-4 (latest) which is a families of large language models (LLMs) comes with improved features and capabilities, including multimodal capabilities for interpreting both text and image inputs, exceptional performance in reasoning tests, and support for over 26 different languages. However, it is not accessible to free users. It is available only via API and ChatGPT premium users for 20$. But today I'll guide you how you can use GPT-4 AI language model for free. Let's jump into the guide.

  1. ForeFront AI

ForeFront AI offers free access to the GPT-4 model without any charge. With no limitations on the number of messages per day, it is and excellent option to use GPT-4 for free.

  1. Ora.sh

Ora.sh is a web platform that allows you to build LLM apps in a shareable chat interface. The developer is now providing users with the opportunity to explore ChatGPT 4 for free, but has limited the usage to 5 messages per day due to high demand.

  1. Bing

Microsoft Bing Chat is another option to access GPT-4 for free. Bing AI has announced that it is already running on the GPT-4 model, also known as "Prometheus," and has some additional features that ChatGPT 4 does not have, such as the ability to generate images with a simple prompt and provide cited sources of information.

  1. HuggingFace

If you're looking for another way to experiment with ChatGPT 4, check out the free bot built by developer Yuvraj Sharma on HuggingFace. You don't even need your own OpenAI API key to use it, as GPT-4 API access is provided by HuggingFace to its community. It also has multilingual support and a token limit of 4096.

  1. Nat.dev

Former CEO of GitHub, Nat Friedman has created an amazing tool to compare different language models offered by AI companies all around the world. It is a tool that can show you how ChatGPT 4 stacked up against other models or just let you explore the incredible GPT-4 model on your own.

  1. Taskade

Taskade is a mind mapping tool for both professionals and students. Recently, it has introduced AI assistant bot which is powered by OpenAI's ChatGPT.

As technology continues to evolve, it's exciting to imagine what other groundbreaking advancements in AI are on the horizon. So, what are you waiting for? Dive into the world of ChatGPT-4 and discover its wonder for yourself!

frontmatter.title: How to use ChatGPT-4 for free
frontmatter.description: ChatGPT-4 is completely is completely free in other sites
